name: Conjurer's Catalyst
description: Deals spell damage to an enemy, causing them to overheat and damage nearby allies. Heroes take more damage.

effects.primary: Spellover: Dealing 100 spell damage overheats the target, dealing 40 damage to heroes and 15 damage to other targets within a 300 unit radius.

notes: Damage increases with level: 40/15 at level 1, 52%/19.5% at max level.
